title: podman play kube and secrets
body: I need some guidance. I can start pods successfully using "podman play kube" with podman secrets, provided to the container with fromEnv and secretRef. My problem with this solution is that then my secrets are viewable using inspect. Is it possible to have them mounted as files like with "podman run --secret"? Or is that just not possible right now with "podman play kube"?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

I think this is an issue with how play kube treats secrets, it doesn't go in as an env secret, but rather just an regular env var https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/aaf90c5596fb2232d915fcd75d4d707d180c1b17/pkg/specgen/generate/kube/kube.go#L597
@rhatdan We talked about this a while ago with @vrothberg, and a while back we came to the conclusion that play kube secrets were kinda broken and incompatible with native podman secrets. This seems serious enough that we should fix it, but as kube secrets and podman secrets go, they're implemented differently enough that we need to discuss again on how to fix it or what we should go going forwards.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@vrothberg I think it is time to revisit this.

I am OK bumping this up the priority list. What we need is:
* Somebody must (re)catch up on what the problem was. I recall that K8s secrets are hierarchical while Podman secrets are flat but I have a squirrel brain.
* A design meeting to discuss how to best solve the problem.
* Somebody to work on it :^)

@acui, do you have time?

@vrothberg  The main thread on the issues with kube secrets, and its problems: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/10105#issuecomment-859887828

I'd be okay with a design meeting and if I'm not fighting machine work, once we get a design on this, I could take this up. It's going to be a long design meeting though, since the arch of podman secrets and kube secrets are so different.

Adding @umohnani8 Also.  I just want to kick off a meeting on completing missing features in podman play/generate kube.  Prioritize and work on the issues that match up with this.  Secrets being one of the big ones.
I sent out a meeting to the four of us next Tuesday.
